mapper.insert: insert into dashboard (stat_date, total_user_count, total_schedule_count) values (#{statDate}, #{userCount}, #{scheduleCount})
mapper.select: select coalesce( (select total_user_count from dashboard order by stat_date desc limit 1 ), 0 )
select coalesce( (select total_schedule_count from dashboard order by stat_date desc limit 1 ), 0 )
select count(*) from schedule where status = 'completed'
select count(*) from schedule where status = 'closed'
select stat_date, total_user_count, total_schedule_count from dashboard order by stat_date limit 14

select max(stat_date) as stat_date, max(total_user_count) as total_user_count, max(total_schedule_count) as total_schedule_count from dashboard group by year(stat_date), week(stat_date, 1) order by stat_date

select max(stat_date) as stat_date, max(total_user_count) as total_user_count, max(total_schedule_count) as total_schedule_count from dashboard group by year(stat_date), month(stat_date) order by stat_date
